ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company belongs to */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the company */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Primary contact email for the company */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Primary contact phone number for the company */,
  "website" TEXT /* Company's website URL */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date the company was established */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offense_types" (
  "offense_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each offense type */,
  "offense_type" TEXT /* Type of offense (e.g., workplace safety or health violation) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the offense type */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the offense (e.g., minor, major, critical) */,
  "legal_reference" TEXT /* Legal reference or statute related to the offense */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("offense_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agencies" (
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agency */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the agency (e.g., OSHA) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the agency */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the agency */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Primary contact email for the agency */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Primary contact phone number for the agency */,
  "website" TEXT /* Agency's website URL */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "violations" (
  "violation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each violation */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company committing the violation */,
  "offense_id" INTEGER /* ID of the offense type */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agency involved */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the violation occurred */,
  "penalty_amount" REAL /* Amount of the penalty */,
  "violation_date" TEXT /* Date the violation occurred */,
  "violation_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the violation */,
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inspector who reported the violation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the violation (e.g., pending, resolved, dismissed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("violation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_violations_inspector_id FOREIGN KEY ("inspector_id") REFERENCES agency_officers ("agency_officer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_violations_offense_id FOREIGN KEY ("offense_id") REFERENCES offense_types ("offense_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_violations_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("agency_id") REFERENCES agencies ("agency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_violations_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "penalty_payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "violation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the violation the payment is for */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., check, bank transfer) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., paid, pending, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_penalty_payments_violation_id FOREIGN KEY ("violation_id") REFERENCES violations ("violation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_officers" (
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each officer */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the officer belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the officer */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the officer */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the officer started their role */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the officer ended their role (if applicable) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the officer */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the officer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("officer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_officers_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agency_officers" (
  "agency_officer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agency officer */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agency the officer belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the officer */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the officer */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the officer started their role */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the officer ended their role (if applicable) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the officer */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the officer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_officer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agency_officers_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("agency_id") REFERENCES agencies ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., agency staff, company officer, public) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
